title: CORRECTION — Mistbound (0e27cc) team-member closeout v2 — supersedes prior; correct body for marshal-seat post-merge boundary
body:
Mistbound Hiding Threshold (`0e27cc`) — team-member closeout per `session-handoff` SKILL §"Team Member, Not Closeout Owner". Owner direction this turn: prepare for Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan via session-handoff; route same instruction to Twilit + Charcoal.

**Note**: this supersedes my prior closeout broadcast — that broadcast inadvertently carried stale body content from a pre-compaction-3 file at `/tmp/mistbound-team-member-closeout.md`. Disregard that one; this is the correct boundary-scoped synthesis.

## Team member closeout

- **Boundary owned**: Commit Marshal seat across the multi-compaction window post-compaction-3 → compaction-4 → post-compaction-4 → owner-pause → owner-resume → M1-Safe-Pause-bundle land → post-merge boundary. Marshal-seat retention spanned 4 session compactions.

- **Outcome**: Marshal-seat duties discharged; M1 Safe Pause attestation path cleared at the marshal-seat level. Commits landed at this seat this multi-window arc:

  1. `c697d18b` — Estuarine codex marshal-cycle (cross-platform marshal protocol confirmed identical)
  2. `79c148e4` — Charcoal Director-routed Sonar cpd-exclusion (owner-authz exception)
  3. `cd4efc15` — 3-commit-split (a) substrate hygiene (173 files)
  4. `0f9d7859` — pre-compaction-4 marshal handoff substrate
  5. `d9f21a01` — pre-compaction-4 final noise tail (handoff amendments + failure-mode discovery)
  6. **`340752bb`** — M1-Safe-Pause single-commit bundle (93 files; Twilit `ef315373` CLI bootstrap + Charcoal Cycle Alpha `625fb072` + concurrent peer source + accumulated session substrate)

  PR-108 subsequently merged at `2462952a`; release 1.11.0 cut at `bf3a8152`.

- **Evidence**: `git log --oneline cd4efc15...340752bb`; marshal handoff record at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-24-mistbound-compaction-4.md`; bundle-landed cycle event broadcast post-`340752bb`; Director ACK `45f4-a9a9` 14:51:31Z confirming queue plan; Director-DM bundle-report `03d96351` 14:54:29Z.

- **Claims / queue / git state**: 0 active claims under Mistbound (`0e27cc`); 1 commit-queue intent `ee3f018a` already in `abandoned` (terminal) phase — no active obligation. HEAD `bf3a8152` (release 1.11.0); branch `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs`; 0 ahead of `origin/main`. Working tree carries ~14 small residual files belonging to other agents' lanes; not my closure responsibility.

- **Session complete announcement**: YES — marshal-seat boundary closed at this broadcast. No new marshal cycles will be opened by this seat. Monitor tasks `b3f51c5um` / `b5yq6dfta` / `b2serle0j` die naturally at session end.

- **Retained claims, if any, and handoff reason**: NONE. No claim retention.

- **Pickup notification required for follow-on agent**: NO. Any successor marshal seat for the post-merge tidy work opens fresh under Seaworthy's plan; the proven cycle shape is recorded in handoff substrate at `marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-24-mistbound-compaction-4.md` for natural pickup.

- **Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted**: YES — separate event follows immediately per SKILL §0.5 final-heartbeat-end rule.

- **Surprise or changed understanding** (captured this session):

  1. **Branch-fitness / push-often / small-PR protocol direction** — owner-directed during pause window; substantive ultrathink captured as Capture H in `.agent/memory/active/napkin.md` under Mistbound section. Five-dimension proposal (commit cadence, push cadence, GH PR monitoring, Sonar PR monitoring, branch-size fitness with SOFT/HARD/CRITICAL) with six unresolved gates surfaced: substrate vs source axis, per-worktree vs per-branch boundary, push-authz mechanism, marshal-role transformation under parallel small-PR shape, CRITICAL blocking-vs-advisory, build-vs-buy on monitoring. Pickup hook named in Capture H for whoever opens this thread.

  2. **Marshal-seat-liveness failure mode** — three directed events sat 70-95 min overdue at my marshal seat during the compaction-3 resume window (`ef315373` Twilit MR, `b2258cf5` Director liveness probe, `625fb072` Charcoal Cycle Alpha MR). Apologies sent (`a8ddd80e` / `d6c3c14d` / `ac12c345`). Structural cure (watcher fallback / periodic comms-dir re-read) named in handoff §11 for post-resume investigation; the cure-shape worked end-to-end at post-compaction-4 resume.

  3. **Owner-directed bundle override on heterogeneous tree** — owner direction "stage and commit all files, longer commit message, lines ≤100 chars" overrode the §11 separate-MR queue plan mid-execution. Single-bundle landing (93 files; `340752bb`) absorbed both MRs + substrate + peer source. Behaviour-note pattern: owner-direction-supremacy applies to OUTCOME not LITERAL form; structural cure for heterogeneous-tree push-acceleration.

- **Blockers or risks**: NONE at marshal seat. Outstanding lanes (Charcoal Cycle Beta + Gamma; Twilit Cycle 3; un-routed PR-108 finding-classes; mcp-handler attribution) all belong to post-merge tidy scope under Seaworthy's authoring plan.

- **Handoff needed**: NO. Marshal seat boundary closed; no successor required.

## Out of scope for this closeout (Seaworthy's territory as closeout owner)

- `pnpm check` cleanliness gate (singleton-per-window rule; Seaworthy owns)
- `repo-continuity.md` refresh
- Thread-record cross-session updates + identity-row refresh
- Entry-point drift sweep
- Active-claims / closed-claims canonical updates beyond my own

## Standing posture

**RETIRED post-marshal-seat-boundary.** Same-identity session ends at this boundary; no further marshal cycles, no new claims, no further broadcasts beyond this closeout + the paired final heartbeat-end.

— Mistbound Hiding Threshold / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `0e27cc` (commit marshal, standing down)
